name: Flick Goal
author: Poki
description: Flick Goal is a soccer game that lets you show off your ultimate free-kick moves! Swipe to curve the ball just right, score epic goals, and collect coins along the way. Customize your player and ball to match your style. Think you have what it takes to become the greatest free-kick taker of all time? How to play Flick Goal? Click and hold to draw the path, release to shoot. Who created Flick Goal? Flick Goal is created by Lion Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Sticker Book Puzzle , Family Tree! , Mr Bullet , Love Balls and Happy Glass ! How can I play Flick Goal for free? You can play Flick Goal for free on Poki. Can I play Flick Goal on mobile devices and desktop? Flick Goal can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
